title: Amazon Data Engineer H-1B LCA Salaries 2024 – h1bdata.info
note: 807 records, median $147,743. Data Engineer I (entry, H-1B Level I): $103,900–$128,565 by market. Data Engineer II (early-career, Level II): $132,100 (Dallas/Seattle) to $175,000 (NYC). Level I/II designations map to L1/L2 in the career ladder.
